code:
\033[34m#******* Python's @dataclass @property *********\033[0m

from dataclasses import dataclass        |# With decorator                       |# Long form w/o decorator                         
                                         |                                       |
@dataclass                               |                                       |
class Rectangle:                         |  class Rectangle:                     |  class Rectangle:
    width: int                           |      def __init__(self, w, h):        |      def __init__(self, w, h):
    height: int                          |          self.width = w               |          self.width = w
                                         |              self.height = h          |              self.height = h                                            
    @property                            |                                       |
    def area(self):                      |              @property                |          def area(self):                               
        return self.width * self.height  |                  def area(self):      |                           
                                         |                                       |      return self.width * self.height 
r = Rectangle(4, 5)                      |      return self.width * self.height  |         
                                         |                                       |      area = property(area)  
print(r.area)                            |                                       |

                  # attribute_name = property(method_name)
